title: How to transpose rows to columns (or columns to rows)
task: Flip data so rows become columns and columns become rows, without retyping.
keywords: convert rows to columns google sheets

excel.note: Spills automatically in Excel 365/2021; older Excel needs Ctrl+Shift+Enter.

libreoffice.note: Identical; modern LibreOffice spills like Excel.

explanation: TRANSPOSE swaps the orientation of a range: a 3-row column becomes a 3-column row, and an m×n table becomes n×m. It's a live formula, so the flipped copy updates when the source changes. For a one-time flip without a formula, copy the range and use Paste Special → Transpose, which all three apps also support.
